seoTitle: Townsville City vs Townview — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Townsville City and Townview. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Townsville City vs Townview: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Townsville City and Townview.
heading: Townsville City vs Townview — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Townsville City, Queensland and Townview, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Townview has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Townsville City (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Townsville City or Townview safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Townsville City has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Townview scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Townsville City scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Townview scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Townsville City or Townview?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Townview has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
